data.title: 国际服叶渚专辑「Memories in Melody」上线
data.summary: ["Memories in Melody" Digital Single Release] Sensei, the digital single for Kanna's "Memories in Me
data.body:
["Memories in Melody" Digital Single Release]

Sensei, the digital single for Kanna's "Memories in Melody" is out now! Listen on various platforms for a mellow start to your Monday! 💚

🎵Streaming Platform Link: https://lnk.to/QM0634
